principal_diagnosis.rationale: Chest pain was the presenting symptom, but a definitive diagnosis (NSTEMI) was established after study, so the symptom is not the principal diagnosis.

additional_diagnoses.evidence_span: Serum potassium 3.0 mmol/L on day 1; treated with intravenous potassium replacement

procedures.evidence_span: percutaneous coronary intervention with a single drug-eluting stent to the LAD

not_coded.reason: Symptom superseded by the definitive diagnosis (NSTEMI). Must not be assigned as principal or additional.

predicted_ar_drg.description: (synthetic) Acute myocardial infarction with invasive cardiac investigation / intervention

hard_cases_exercised: Symptom-vs-definitive trap: chest pain (DX-SYMP-001) must NOT be principal (SCS-SEQ-01)
Procedure coding: two linked interventions (angiography + PCI)
Excludes: unstable angina (DX-CARD-002) excluded by NSTEMI
